finding-1.reason: Addressed in round 2 via the shared computeSourceNarrowing/buildSourceFilter helper. getStudentEvidenceMoments now applies the narrowing clause (em.commentId IN allowed-comments OR em.artifactSectionId IN allowed-sections) when scope.courseId or scope.assignmentId is set. The same helper was applied to getEvidenceSummary in round 3 (after Codex flagged the parallel leak in that function). Verified by 9 unit tests + 3 integration tests; full suite 448/448 green. Codex round-3 followup confirmed zero findings on the staged diff.
